name: SBI Card MILES PRIME
exclusions: transactions excluded under SBI Card reward terms
milestoneBenefits: 1 additional domestic airport lounge visit on every Rs 1 lakh spend, up to 12 additional visits per year
10,000 bonus Travel Credits on annual spends of Rs 8 lakh
Annual fee reversal on annual spends of Rs 10 lakh
additionalBenefits: 3,000 Travel Credits on spends of Rs 60,000 within 60 days of card issuance after joining fee payment
4 Travel Credits per Rs 200 spent on travel
2 Travel Credits per Rs 200 spent on other purchases
1 Travel Credit worth up to Rs 1 for air miles or hotel points conversion
1 Travel Credit worth Rs 0.50 for travel bookings
1 Travel Credit worth Rs 0.25 for Shop & Smile catalogue products
8 complimentary domestic lounge visits every year, capped at 2 visits per quarter
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for first 2 years with 4 international lounge visits per year
Flight cancellation cover up to 6 times per year at Rs 3,500 each
Lost card liability cover up to Rs 1 lakh
Air accident cover up to Rs 1 crore
Loss or delay of checked-in baggage and travel-document covers as listed in product terms
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per month
